texto: We don't need no more danger, we don't need no more difficulties, we don't need no more misunderstanding, and we don't need no more violence. We need the people to see each other and know of each other, feel each other, touch each other, share with each other, and change hearts with each other.
explicacao: Citação de Burning Spear sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “We don't need no more danger, we don't need no more difficulties, we don't need no more misunders…” articula amor, violence, people em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e people.

We need the people to see each other and know of each other, feel each other, touch each other, share with each other, and change hearts with each other.

texto: When people see a legend, they call it a legend. But to be a legend, it's a lot of hard work and patience. You can't play for five or ten years and be a legend. It takes longer than that.
explicacao: Citação de Burning Spear sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “When people see a legend, they call it a legend. But to be a legend, it's a lot of hard work and …” articula trabalho, work, hard-work em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.

frase_original: When people see a legend, they call it a legend. But to be a legend, it's a lot of hard work and patience. You can't play for five or ten years and be a legend. It takes longer than that.

texto: I've been singing about love a long time now, because my kind of love carries a different flavor. My lyrics are not so outrageous as some. You have to think about a lot of different things. You get more mature with what you do - more experience, more capable, you know, the older you get.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Burning Spear sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “I've been singing about love a long time now, because my kind of love carries a different flavor.…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, love, time, útil em momentos de time e singing.

You have to think about a lot of different things. You get more mature with what you do - more experience, more capable, you know, the older you get.
